description_for_human: Secure client vault for boutique accounting and tax firms — encrypted document exchange, PBC task management, and automated follow-ups.
description_for_model: VaultLedger is a SaaS platform that helps boutique accounting and tax firms securely exchange documents with clients. Key features include encrypted document vaults, PBC (Provided By Client) task lists, per-client folders, white-label branding, Busy Season auto-reminders, and audit trails. Pricing: Solo CPA $29/mo, Boutique Firm $79/mo, Enterprise Vault $199/mo. 14-day free trial.
